title: digitaria zeyheri
intro: Digitaria zeyheri, also known as finger grass, is a type of grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Digitaria zeyheri include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wound healing. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared by making a tea from its leaves and roots, which is then used to treat various health conditions.
